hvac_apply_factory_defaults.name: HVAC - Apply Factory Defaults
hvac_apply_factory_defaults.description: Sets all input_number and input_select entities to their intended default values. Called by hvac_first_run_defaults on fresh install.

hvac_apply_target.name: HVAC - Apply Target
hvac_apply_target.description: Sets controller mode + per-zone setpoints (or closes everything when mode=off)

irrigation_run_sequential.name: Irrigation - Run Sequential
irrigation_run_sequential.description: Runs due zones sequentially through the Rain Bird RC2. Order: 1 (lawn back), 4 (lawn front), 2 (pines), 3 (fruit), 5 (veggies). Scales runtimes proportionally if total would exceed the 23:00-07:55 window. Test mode forces 1 min per zone regardless of conditions.

inverter.name: Inverter
inverter.description: Which inverter to target. Pass a device ID or unique friendly name. If your inverter isn't listed here, it probably isn't supported.

enable_force_charge.name: Enable force charge
enable_force_charge.description: Whether to enable this force charge window.

enable_charge_from_grid.name: Enable charge from grid
enable_charge_from_grid.description: If set, the battery will charge from PV and the grid during this force charge window, until it reaches Max SoC. If unset, the battery will charge from PV but not the grid during this force charge window, and won't discharge.

start.name: Period Start
start.description: The start of the charge period. This is only required if 'Enable force charge' is selected.

end.name: Period End
end.description:
The end of the charge period. This is only required of 'Enable force charge' is selected.
This may not be less than or equal to 'Start' (time periods may not span midnight).

update_charge_period.description: Updates one of the two charge periods (if supported by your inverter, see https://github.com/nathanmarlor/foxess_modbus/wiki/Supported-Features)
update_charge_period.name: Update Charge Period

inverter.name: Inverter
inverter.description: Which inverter to target. Pass a device ID or unique friendly name. If your inverter isn't listed here, it probably isn't supported.

charge_periods.name: Charge Periods
charge_periods.description: Charge periods to set. This should be an array of objects, one for each charge period. All charge periods must be specified. See the example data
charge_periods.example:
- enable_force_charge: true
  enable_charge_from_grid: true
  start: "01:00"
  end: "03:00"
- enable_force_charge: false
  enable_charge_from_grid: false

update_all_charge_periods.description: Sets all charge periods in one service call (if supported by your inverter, see https://github.com/nathanmarlor/foxess_modbus/wiki/Supported-Features). The service "Update Charge Period" is easier for end-users to use.
update_all_charge_periods.name: Update All Charge Periods
